Module 8 — Self-Improving Agents

Continuous Learning Company OS v8
⭐ Output Scorer
🔁 Score & Retry
🧬 Prompt Evolution
🏆 Leaderboard
💬 Human Feedback
🧪 A/B Testing
📥 Distill Knowledge

⭐ Score Any Agent Output

📊 Scores

Run a scoring to see dimension breakdown.

🔍 Critique

Detailed critique will appear here.

🔁 Score → Critique → Retry Loop

Agent runs a task, gets scored, reads the critique, then retries automatically until score threshold is met.

80
Not started.

📋 Final output (best version)

Final improved output will appear here...

🧬 Prompt Evolution

Evolve agent system prompts over time by mutating the current best prompt and keeping the winner.

Run evolution to see candidate prompt and head-to-head scores.

🏆 Agent Leaderboard

📈 Score History

💬 Human Feedback Loop

Rate outputs, add notes, and let the agent incorporate feedback into its next run.

📋 Feedback Log

No feedback submitted yet.

🧪 A/B Prompt Testing

Run the same task with two different prompts/models and auto-score both. Keep the winner.

A/B results will appear here after the test runs.

📥 Distill Knowledge into System Prompt

Take a collection of high-quality outputs, lessons, or feedback and distill them into an improved system prompt.

Improved system prompt will appear here...

🚀 How to use
Step 1 — Start the bridge server
node company-os-cli.js server
Step 2 — Run agents from any terminal
node company-os-cli.js run ceo --task "Q3 plan"
